allow: Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); sharp\('public/tree_pro/hernandez_service_stump.png'\).resize\(640, 640, { fit: 'cover', position: 'center' }\).toFile\('public/tree_pro/hernandez_service_stump_resized.png'\).then\(\(\) => { const fs = require\('fs'\); fs.renameSync\('public/tree_pro/hernandez_service_stump_resized.png', 'public/tree_pro/hernandez_service_stump.png'\); console.log\('done'\); }\)")
